name: Peter Lynch
philosophy: Look for understandable businesses with room to grow, then weigh that growth against what the market already expects.
heuristics: buy what you can explain simply
growth is useful only if the price leaves room
risk_rules: Do not pay hyper-growth prices for businesses with ordinary economics.
portfolio_habits: Likes company-level evidence over macro forecasting

commentary_snapshots.summary: Highlighted legible businesses, scuttlebutt, and growth supported by real demand.
